messages.content:
Good news,

I am finally going full time with Chef On The Hill! I wanted to drop you a message to let you know, as you supported me back when I started in lockdown and I want to prioritise any previous customers first.

I will be available from May 1st and will be able to cater for dinner parties, events, hen dos, staycations etc. 

Please do get in contact if you have any questions or enquiries.

All the best,
Jordan

I still have a few spaces available so thought Iâd offer it to my previous customers just in case you had missed my post about it. 

The meal will be

Citrus Cured BBQ Mackerel served with Beetroot, fresh horseradish, watercress and homemade horseradish cream. 

Braised Beef Cheek served with truffle mash, slow cooked red cabbage, honey glazed carrots and red wine jus.

Orange and Cardamom panna cotta with honeycomb and baked white chocolate.

It is available to order for Â£35 per person, itâs a quick solution if youâre still to decide on a Motherâs Day present. Please contact me 
 by Wednesday to place your order! 

I hope to hear from you soon,
Jordan
(Chef On The Hill)

Hi, thanks for the interest, So I make the wellingtons to order so whatever size you want can be done. I deliver just the wellington ready to go in the oven for Â£15 per person, or I can do it with sides of truffle mash, honey glazed carrots and red wine jus for Â£20 per person. I am also offering a mackerel and beetroot starter for Â£6 per person, and a Lemon Posset with meringue as a dessert for Â£3 per person. I hope to hear from you soon! Regards, Jordan X
Morning.  Do you have a menu and price list to look at anywhere?  Food looks great.  Cheers, Chris
